name: DrawingArea.Viewer

aliases.name: Viewer
aliases.type: { frame : Frame2d, size : Vector2d, zoom : Float }

values.name: center
values.comment: Compute the center point of the viewing area.

values.name: centerAt
values.comment: Recenter the viewing area at a given point.

values.name: default
values.comment: Default viewer.

values.name: fitImage
values.comment: Fit the view so that the image takes a certain percentage of its max viewable size.

values.name: move
values.comment: Move the viewer.

values.name: positionIn
values.comment: Transform coordinates of a point in the frame to their actual coordinates.

values.name: setSize
values.comment: Resize the viewer.

values.name: setZoom
values.comment: Set the zoom value.

values.name: setZoomCentered
values.comment: Set zoom value while keeping the current center.

values.name: sizeIn
values.comment: Scale a size in the frame to its actual size.

values.name: viewSet
values.comment: View the svg tag representing the DrawingArea model.
values.type: List (Attribute msg) -> Viewer -> Maybe Image -> Set -> Html msg

values.name: zoomIn
values.comment: Zoom in (x2).

values.name: zoomOut
values.comment: Zoom out (x0.5).

name: Annotation.Set

aliases.name: Set
aliases.comment: An annotation set is basically an array of annotations.

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove the annotation at the given index from the set.

values.name: selectTag
values.comment: Create a <select> tag with an <option> tag for each annotation.

values.name: view
values.comment: View of the SVG representation of all the annotations in the set.

name: Annotation

unions.name: Input
unions.comment: A visual input related to an image.

aliases.name: Annotation
aliases.comment: An annotation is a labelled visual input.

values.name: addPoint
values.comment: Add a point to the input

values.name: empty
values.comment: An empty annotation, only useful as startup.

values.name: encodePath
values.comment: Encode the path of an annotation

values.name: initOutline
values.comment: Initialize the input with origin point of the outline.

values.name: initScribble
values.comment: Initialize the input with origin point of the scribble.

values.name: isValid
values.comment: Indicates if the input of an annotation is valid.

values.name: optionDescriber
values.comment: Text of an <option> tag describing an annotation.

values.name: setLabel
values.comment: Set the label of an annotation.

values.name: setRectangle
values.comment: Set the input to be a rectangle selection.

values.name: update
values.comment: Update an annotation depending on pointer events
values.type: Pointer -> Track -> Tool -> Int -> Option -> Option

values.name: view
values.comment: View an annotation input.

name: Pointer

unions.name: Event
unions.comment: Events generated by a pointer device.

unions.name: Track
unions.comment: Track the first and last pointer events.

aliases.name: Pointer
aliases.type: { event : Event, offsetX : Float, offsetY : Float, movementX : Float, movementY : Float }

values.name: askTime
values.comment: Use a message maker (tagger) to create a command message giving Time.now.

values.name: attributes
values.comment: Returns a list of attribute messages with useful mouse events listeners.
values.type: (Pointer -> msg) -> Tool -> Maybe Pointer -> List (Attribute msg)

values.name: movement
values.comment: Returns (movementX, movementY).

values.name: movementOn
values.comment: Returns movementOn attribute.
values.type: String -> Event -> (Pointer -> msg) -> (( Float, Float ) -> ( Float, Float )) -> Attribute msg

values.name: noToolAttributes
values.comment: Returns a list of attribute messages to detect movement when no tool is used.

values.name: offset
values.comment: Returns (offsetX, offsetY).

values.name: offsetOn
values.comment: Returns offsetOn attribute.
values.type: String -> Event -> (Pointer -> msg) -> (( Float, Float ) -> ( Float, Float )) -> Attribute msg

values.name: toolAttributes
values.comment: Returns a list of attribute messages to detect movement when a tool is used.

values.name: touchOffsetOn
values.comment: Returns touchOffsetOn attribute.
values.type: String -> Event -> (Pointer -> msg) -> (( Float, Float ) -> ( Float, Float )) -> Attribute msg

values.name: updateTrack
values.comment: Update a record track with a new pointer event.

name: Tool
comment:
Tools aims at providing helper functions related to the drawing area tools.

@docs Tool, selectTag

unions.name: Tool
unions.comment: The type of tool that can be used to draw inputs.

values.name: selectTag
values.comment: An html <select> tag enabling the choice of a tool.
